## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss LLM rank tracking tools and strategies for measuring AI-driven search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses Scrunch for LLM rank tracking; considering building proprietary solution in future](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Diligent experiencing organic click-through drop, higher impressions (zero searches), competing with own nonprofit product](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [LLM ranking tools still in early stages; results can be inconsistent (API vs. direct model queries)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Diligent aims to onboard GrowthX before June 23rd board meeting, targeting Q2 close](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Topics

### Current LLM Rank Tracking Approaches

  - [GrowthX partnering with Scrunch:](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
      - [Identifies prompts and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
      - [Tracks rankings, mentions, positioning, sentiment](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Analyzes competitor presence, content evolution needs](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
      - [Limited in category-level aggregation (team discussing improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Diligent exploring free tool (unnamed):](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Provides positioning and category-level aggregation](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [Shows discrepancies (e.g., Diligent not top-ranked despite market leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### Challenges in LLM Rank Tracking

  - [Numerous SEO tools emerging (esp. YC-backed)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Inconsistencies between API results and direct model queries](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Early-stage tools with inherent flaws](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Difficulty in accurately representing category-level rankings](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Diligent's Search Performance Trends

  - [Organic click-throughs dropping significantly](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Impressions increasing (mostly zero searches)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Strong presence due to longevity and brand strength](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Competing with own nonprofit product (BoardEffect)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)

### Tool Landscape

  - [Scrunch: One of the better options, similar to others](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Positional: Mentioned as interesting (2-year-old company)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Many YC-backed SEO companies with unclear differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Abi to finalize contract details with Olivia (aiming for next week)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Kyle to coordinate kickoff date with team (typically 2 per week max)](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Target onboarding GrowthX before Diligent's June 23rd board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Aim for deal closure well before end of Q2](https://fathom.video/share/fRWTM9Hd5Lxn4WMo5FgUzJmmKdxyU1Lg?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
